name: serverkit-crowdsec
description: CrowdSec security engine integration — surface active decisions and alerts, ban/unban IPs, and manage allowlists straight from the panel. Read/write via cscli on the host; shows install guidance when CrowdSec is absent (never auto-installs).
author: ServerKit

command_palette.label: CrowdSec
command_palette.keywords: crowdsec decisions alerts bans ips allowlist security waf appsec
